value.found_quote: Cost tracking | Spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution | Anthropic only | [Costs](/en/costs)
value.rationale: The page substantiates that Claude Code offers cost tracking capability, describing it as covering "Spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution." This aligns with the claim's description of tracking spend and monitoring costs for agent runs. However, the page does not explicitly mention "per-session token accounting" as described in the claim — it only mentions spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution at a high level, linking to a /en/costs page for details. The claim is partially supported: cost tracking/spend monitoring is confirmed, but the specific "per-session token accounting" detail is not verbatim on this page. The feature is listed as generally available (active), available to "Anthropic only" providers.
